spec_match.rationale: Directly demonstrates unspokenPunctuation by running two concurrent SpeechRecognition instances side-by-side, one with the flag enabled and one disabled.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive, letting the user trigger live speech recognition on two distinct instances simultaneously with real-time outputs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment between the page description and the feature-level blurb.

edge_cases.rationale: Lacks error handling for when concurrent SpeechRecognition instances fail to acquire the mic simultaneously (often a platform limitation).

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the references section.

design_system.rationale: Overriding button background in active/recording states without explicitly declaring text color violates the button override policy.

openQuestions.title: Add error handling for concurrent mic sessions
openQuestions.detail: Running two concurrent SpeechRecognition instances on the same device is often blocked or restricted by the browser or OS. The demo should add onerror event listeners to both instances and show a helpful warning if a session gets aborted or fails with service-not-allowed.

openQuestions.title: Specify color for recording button override
openQuestions.detail: The .ctl-btn.recording rule overrides the button's background to --accent-rose but does not set its text color. Explicitly declare color to conform with design system standards and guarantee contrast.
